footer.brand_desc: Crafting timeless spaces inspired by the royal heritage of Jaipur. Where luxury meets legacy.

home.hero_desc: Premium plots, villas & apartments in Jaipur — blending Rajasthani heritage with modern comfort.
home.why_title: A Better Way To Find Your Next Home
home.why_desc: ANG Group makes buying or renting easier with verified listings, honest guidance, and fast scheduling.
home.why_prime_desc: Our plots are strategically located in fast-developing areas with high future growth potential.
home.why_afford_desc: We offer competitive pricing designed to suit every buyers budget without compromising on value.
home.why_docs_desc: 100% legal plots with transparent paperwork, ensuring a safe and secure investment.
home.why_roi_desc: An ideal choice for long-term investment with strong appreciation potential.
home.why_booking_desc: Hassle-free booking experience with complete support from our team at every step.
home.why_trusted_desc: Trusted by numerous happy buyers for our quality, reliability, and commitment.
home.test_desc: Real feedback from real clients — buying, renting, and investing made easier.
home.test_text_1: The listings were accurate and the tour booking was super quick. We found our home in two weekends.
home.test_text_2: Transparent pricing and helpful agents. The process felt simple and stress-free from day one.
home.test_text_3: Great local knowledge and honest advice. I appreciated the clear paperwork and fast follow-ups.
home.faq_desc: Quick answers about tours, listings, and how we work.
home.faq_q1: How do I schedule a home tour?
home.faq_a1: Use the "Schedule a Tour" section to pick a date and time slot. Our team confirms the visit and shares the address and agent details.
home.faq_a2: Yes, all our listings undergo a rigorous verification process checking legal documents and physical conditions before they are published.
home.faq_q3: Do you help with loans and paperwork?
home.faq_a3: Absolutely. We have tied up with leading banks to provide quick home loan approvals, and our legal team handles all the documentation.
home.faq_a4: Yes, you can browse and shortlist as many properties as you like, and we can schedule a combined site visit for all of them.
home.why_title_new: A Better Way To Find Your Next Home
home.why_desc_new: Experience seamless property investment with verified listings, clear paperwork guidance, and direct-from-developer pricing in Jaipur's fastest growing areas.
home.why_new_prime_desc: Plots in fast-developing areas of Jaipur — Ajmer Road, Tonk Road, Jagatpura & more.
home.why_new_broker_desc: Direct-from-developer pricing. No hidden charges, no middlemen cutting into your budget.
home.why_new_docs_desc: We show original land records on the very first visit. Transparent paperwork guidance at every step.
home.why_new_value_desc: Properties in areas with strong appreciation history and future development potential.
home.why_new_visits_desc: Our team personally takes you for site visits — no rushing, no pressure. You decide at your pace.
home.why_new_expert_desc: Deep roots in Jaipur's property market. We know which areas are actually growing vs just marketed.
home.test_desc_new: Real words from real buyers — no scripts, no fake reviews.
home.test_new_text_1: We bought a 200 Sq Yd plot in Narayam City 8 through ANG Group. Documents were clear, registry was done in 30 days. Highly recommended.
home.test_new_text_2: No broker, no hidden charges. The team showed us original land records on our very first visit. That's what built our trust.
home.test_new_text_3: We were confused between 3 societies. ANG Group's team personally took us for a site visit and helped us decide. Best decision we made.
home.test_new_text_4: We were looking for a ready home within our budget for over a year. ANG Group showed us exactly what we needed, handled all the paperwork and we got possession within 45 days.
home.cta_label_new: Ready to Take the Next Step?
home.cta_desc: No pressure. No broker. Just honest advice and a free site visit — whenever you're ready.
home.faq_title_new: Every Question a Buyer Has Before Investing
home.faq_desc_new: We know what worries buyers. Here are honest answers — no marketing fluff.
home.faq_new_q1: It feels too expensive for me right now.
home.faq_new_a1:
We understand. That's why we first understand your budget and then show you only what fits — not properties above your range. We also help you understand if EMI or installment-based payment options are available. Many buyers who "waited for the right time" later found prices had gone up. One conversation with us costs nothing.

Share your budget range with us — we'll show you what's genuinely available in that range.
home.faq_new_q2: I don't know much about property buying.
home.faq_new_a2:
That's actually the best time to come to us. We explain everything in simple terms — from what to check in documents, to what questions to ask, to how registry works. 90% of our clients were first-time buyers. You don't need to know anything before calling us.

We walk you through the entire process step by step — no jargon, no confusion.
home.faq_new_q3: ⏳ Let me think about it / I'll come back later.
home.faq_new_a3:
Absolutely your right. But here's what we've seen: good plots at a fair price get booked fast. If you're 60–70% sure, a site visit costs you nothing but 2 hours. Seeing the plot in person answers far more questions than thinking alone. There's no obligation to buy on a visit.

Book a free site visit — just 2 hours, zero commitment. You'll have far more clarity after.
home.faq_new_q4: Will this property actually work for my needs?
home.faq_new_a4:
Tell us what you need — family home, investment, rental income, farmhouse, or business space. We'll match you with options that genuinely fit, not just whatever is available. We don't push a property that doesn't suit you — a happy client sends us referrals, a pushed sale doesn't.

Call us and describe your situation — we'll tell you honestly if we have something suitable.
home.faq_new_q5: What if something goes wrong after I buy?
home.faq_new_a5:
We encourage all buyers to get independent legal verification before finalizing. We show you all available documents upfront. We are not RERA registered currently, and we are transparent about that. Our reputation in Jaipur is built on honest dealings over 19+ years — but we always recommend you do your own due diligence alongside.

We show documents on Day 1. Independent legal check is always recommended and we support that process.
home.faq_new_q6: How long does the whole process take?
home.faq_new_a6:
From first visit to possession, our recent buyers have got it done in 30–45 days when documents are in order. The timeline depends on your decision speed, document readiness, and the specific property. We guide you at every step so nothing gets stuck or delayed unnecessarily.

Our clients Aarav Sharma (30 days) and Ankit Sachdeva (45 days) got full possession including registry done quickly.
home.faq_new_q7: Is this actually a good investment or will I lose money?
home.faq_new_a7:
We don't make return promises — nobody should. What we do is show you areas with solid fundamentals: road connectivity, upcoming infrastructure, historical price trends, and rental demand. We help you understand the logic — you make the call. Many of our repeat clients started with one plot and came back for more after seeing real appreciation.

We explain the price logic and location fundamentals clearly. You decide based on facts, not pressure.

about.desc: Founded on the architectural principles of Rajasthan's majestic palaces, AngGroup brings timeless elegance to modern living spaces.
about.vision_desc: To be the pinnacle of luxury real estate in India, creating spaces that seamlessly blend historical grandeur with cutting-edge modern design, fostering communities that appreciate true craftsmanship.
about.mission_desc: To deliver uncompromising quality, maintain absolute transparency, and provide an unparalleled customer experience by creating homes that are as deeply rooted in heritage as they are forward-looking.
about.gopal_quote: "We don't build houses; we craft heirlooms. Every project is a tribute to Jaipur's incredible architectural legacy."
about.gopal_desc: With over 19 years of experience in real estate, Gopal Singh has guided hundreds of clients toward confident, rewarding property investments built on trust and transparency.
about.jitender_desc: Driving innovation and operational excellence to ensure every AngGroup project meets the highest standards of luxury and quality.
about.diff_1_desc: Inspired by jharokhas, courtyards, and sandstone artistry of the Pink City.
about.diff_2_desc: From Italian marble to smart home automation, we use only the finest materials.
about.diff_3_desc: Carefully selected parcels of land ensuring high ROI and excellent connectivity.
about.diff_4_desc: Every layout is meticulously planned to ensure positive energy and harmony.
about.diff_5_desc: Clear communication, legal transparency, and timely deliveries.
about.diff_6_desc: Tailor your living spaces to match your exact taste and lifestyle requirements.

contact.reach_us: Reach us anytime — we're always here to help.
